description:
A family medicine practice is opening a second location and needs it registered in the EHR system. Log in to LibreHealth EHR (username: admin, password: password) and add a new facility with the following details:

- Name: Lakewood Family Health Center
- Phone: (303) 555-0147
- Fax: (303) 555-0148
- Street: 456 Wadsworth Boulevard
- City: Lakewood
- State: CO
- Zip/Postal Code: 80226
- Country: US
- Federal Tax ID (EIN): 84-3127856
- Facility NPI: 1234567893
- Taxonomy: 261QP2300X
- POS Code: 11 (Office)
- Billing Location: Yes
- Accepts Assignment: Yes
- Service Location: Yes
- Color: #3BB9FF
